{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1244865?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ridingsa", "id": 1244865, "login": "ridingsa", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEyNDQ4NjU=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ridingsa", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54335", "cvss": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1321", "name": "Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')"}], "description": "### Impact

The `_.merge(target, source)` utility exported by `@feathersjs/commons` recursively merges `source` into `target` by iterating `Object.keys(source)`. When `source` was produced by `JSON.parse` and contains a `__proto__` (or `constructor` / `prototype`) key, that key is returned as an own-enumerable property. The recursive merge then resolves `target['__proto__']` to `Object.prototype` and writes the attacker-supplied properties onto it, polluting the prototype for all plain objects in the process for the lifetime of the Node process.

**Scope of real-world risk is limited.** No first-party Feathers package routes input — trusted or untrusted — through `commons._.merge`. The `@feathersjs/authentication` package, which does merge request-influenced data, uses `lodash/merge` (prototype-pollution-safe since 4.17.12), not this utility. Exploitation therefore requires a downstream plugin or application to pass JSON-parsed, attacker-controlled input directly through the exported `_.merge`.

### Patches

Fixed in `@feathersjs/commons@5.0.45`. The fix skips `__proto__`, `constructor`, and `prototype` keys during iteration — the standard remediation used by lodash and others.

### Workarounds

Avoid passing JSON-parsed untrusted input through `commons._.merge`. Freezing `Object.prototype` or validating/sanitizing keys upstream also mitigates.

### Credit

Reported responsibly by Andrew Ridings (@ridingsa).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00389, "percentile": 0.31238}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-28xv-ph75-77wh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-14T19:40:05Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-28xv-ph75-77wh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-28xv-ph75-77wh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54335"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-14T19:40:05Z", "references": ["https://github.com/feathersjs/feathers/security/advisories/GHSA-28xv-ph75-77wh", "https://github.com/feathersjs/feathers/pull/3690", "https://github.com/feathersjs/feathers/commit/28b3c03c63bdbff53115fdaa46c56980e7942acc", "https://github.com/feathersjs/feathers/releases/tag/v5.0.45", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-28xv-ph75-77wh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/feathersjs/feathers/security-advisories/GHSA-28xv-ph75-77wh", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/feathersjs/feathers", "summary": "Prototype pollution in @feathersjs/commons _.merge via JSON-parsed __proto__", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-14T19:40:06Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-28xv-ph75-77wh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.0.45", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@feathersjs/commons"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.0.44"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Prototype pollution in @feathersjs/commons _.merge via JSON-parsed __proto__
